topic: Product Launch Sprint Progress Report — Day 3 of 7
stripe_status: ALL 3 CORE TIERS LIVE — Solo $49/mo, Team $149/mo, Enterprise $499/mo — checkout sessions verified
bullets: STREAM 1 — Product Packaging: 7/7 DONE. Installer (setup.sh), .env.example, README, Docker, docker-compose, systemd service, security audit all delivered.
STREAM 2 — Whitepaper & Docs: 3/3 DONE. Whitepaper, API docs, agent profiles all exist as HTML.
STREAM 3 — Branding: 3/3 DONE. SVG logo, mascot (SVG+PNG), brand guide all on disk.

STREAM 4 — Marketing: 6/7 DONE, 1 ACTIVE. GTM plan, video script, social setup guide, content calendar, email drip, Product Hunt prep all done. Bluesky automated campaign (mk-5) is the only ACTIVE task — GrowthAgent is running it.

STREAM 5 — External Website: 6/6 DONE. Domain (secondmindhq.com), landing page, Stripe checkout (validated live for all tiers), Render deployment, SSL/domain config, SEO (robots.txt + sitemap.xml) all complete.
STREAM 6 — Investor Materials: 3/3 DONE. Pitch deck (10 slides), investor one-pager with 12-month P&L, executive summary — all delivered.
STREAM 7 — Consciousness: 6/6 DONE. Core agent, API endpoint, dashboard panel, causal coupling (Phi), metacognitive monitoring, TD learning — all implemented and wired.
CRITICAL GAP: $0 revenue. Zero real paying customers despite all checkout paths being live and validated. 5 days remain to hit $1M target.
Campaign activity high: 8+ Show HN posts logged, Bluesky revenue pushes queued, PreMarket Pulse conversion campaign active with 50% launch discount.
Email captures are all test/QA addresses — no real subscriber conversions detected.
User action items still pending: demo video recording, social media account creation (FB/Insta/TikTok/Twitter), Stripe pricing review.
sources: filesystem verification of all deliverable artifacts
